title: Retail Industry SME & Transformation Lead
description:
The person needs to act as a strategic advisor who has deep retail industry knowledge to advice client stakeholders on solving industry problems, bridging the gap between deep operational retail knowledge and high-level business transformation. These roles often focus on optimizing ecommerce strategies, digital transformation, and supply chain efficiency.

The Retail SME leverages extensive industry experience to help clients identify operational gaps, navigate market disruptions (such as AI-driven personalization), and implement data-driven solutions to improve profitability and customer experience.

Key Responsibilities

• Industry Expertise & Domain Knowledge: The person needs to have experience in e commerce backend systems, marketplace operations, logistics/3PL coordination, and cross functional work with Commercial, Planning, Finance, and Ops.

• Strategic Advisory: Lead Consulting assessments of retail operations, identifying areas for growth and crafting tailored recommendations for transformation intervention and efficiency improvement

• Process Optimization: Redesign workflows to improve efficiency in areas such as merchandising, store layout, inventory management, and workforce productivity.

• Digital Transformation: Advise the client in selection and integration of technology stacks involving e-commerce platforms, POS systems, and analytics solutions for retail operations & forecasting.

• Implementation & Support: Manage end-to-end consulting engagements, from initial feasibility to "Go-Live" support to post-launch performance monitoring.

• Stakeholder Management: Facilitate workshops and training sessions for senior client stakeholders and present actionable insights to C-suite executives.

• Business case & Roadmap: Person should be thorough with business case creation, doing TCO analysis and prepare transformation roadmap for the client

Required Skills & Qualifications

• Experience: Typically 15+ years in retail management or retail consulting with a proven track record of driving impactful change.

• Industry Knowledge: Deep understanding of retail business models & business processes involving e commerce, marketplace operations, logistics and emerging trends like sustainability

• Technical Proficiency: Skilled in retail management software, ERP systems (SAP IS Retail), and CRM tools

• Soft Skills: Strong problem-solving, persuasion, and negotiation abilities, alongside excellent verbal and written communication skills.

• Education: A Bachelor’s degree in Business or Retail Management is usually required; an MBA or professional certification is highly preferred.



No Recruitment Agency needed.

postedCompany.description:
Archer Logic is a leading software solution provider based in Singapore, Malaysia, India and Hong Kong; offering consultancy and solutions to MNCs, government agencies and leading SMEs.


As we are expanding across Asia, we are looking for candidates with the right attitude to join our team. If you have what it takes, we welcome you to join us.
